channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 64375caa-ac3e-48b3-9492-da4d60aba7bb
Display name: Diagnostics Operator
Description: Role allows users to collect diagnostic information regarding their Virtual Machine
Link: https://management.azure.com/64375caa-ac3e-48b3-9492-da4d60aba7bb?api-version=2022-04-01
